title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick — Page 543
raw_text:
The enigma is alive, aware of us, and changing. It is partly created by our
own minds; we alter it by perceiving it, since we are not outside it. As our
views shift, it shifts. In a sense it is not there at all (acosmism); in another
sense it is a vast intelligence; in another sense it is total harmonia and
structure. (How logically can it be all three? Well, it is.)
work_title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick
